series_metadata.series_description: Series includes all information technology State Term Schedule Offer, Contract and Amendment documents. Series includes approved vendors and authorized dealers, products with pricing and terms including software licensing and maintenance warranties. Paper records stored on-site or warehoused. Machine readable stored in contract management database. ORC 2305 applies to these records.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: "For sale of goods, retain five years after termination of the contract then destroy. For services, retain nine years after termination of the contract, then destroy. " ; Paper: "For sale of goods, retain five years after termination of the contract then destroy. For services, retain nine years after termination of the contract, then destroy. ", Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
